channel.title: linux on Li Chao Cheng Blog
channel.description: Recent content in linux on Li Chao Cheng Blog

item.title: openWrt uci
item.description: uci set 1 2 3 4 5 6 root@Accesshub:/etc/config# uci set qos.cc=interface root@Accesshub:/etc/config# uci set qos.cc.classgroup=default root@Accesshub:/etc/config# uci set qos.cc.enabled=1 root@Accesshub:/etc/config# uci set qos.cc.upload=134 root@Accesshub:/etc/config# uci set qos.cc.download=1000 root@Accesshub:/etc/config# uci commit qos 1 2 3 4 5 6 root@Accesshub:/etc/config# grep -A 6 cc qos config interface 'cc' option classgroup 'default' option enabled '1' option upload '134' option download '1000' uci add 1 2 3 4 5 6 root@Accesshub:/etc/config# uci add
